response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a Junior/Mid-level role — a significant seniority mismatch that creates retention and compensation risk. Technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, Postgres-adjacent SQL) exceed requirements, but the role is explicitly entry-level with on-site presence required, while the candidate is based in Bangalore and currently employed at Staff level in Berlin. Overqualification, likely salary expectations, and geographic/relocation friction outweigh the strong technical fit.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js fullstack experience across multiple production platforms
React experience plus relational DB and REST API fluency matches core stack
Architecture and clean-code mindset (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based) exceeds JD expectations
concerns: Severe overqualification — Staff-level engineer applying for entry-level IC role
Location mismatch (Bangalore) vs. high on-site presence requirement
Only basic German listed; construction/energy consulting domain is German-market heavy
